name: Free-shipping messaging (if / else)
description: A rule fires actions only when its condition matches, so an 'else' is a second rule with the negated condition. Here one branch appends a positive message and the other appends a different one; the two conditions are mutually exclusive, so exactly one appends to Messages. Note the condition is written twice (once plain, once inside NOT) and must be kept in sync — see 14-if-else-decision-table.json for the DRY equivalent.

rules.description: Condition met: append the positive message.
Same condition negated with a NOT group: append a different message.

actions.value: Add more to your cart to unlock free shipping.
